zh.lifeSummary: 當William Weston VII於1405年出生在英國素瑞奧可哈姆時，他的父親William de Weston VI25歲，母親Matilda Herrberger26歲。他和Margaret Richking至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1448年在英國素瑞被列為escheator of the king。他去世於1466年7月3日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞奧可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Weston VII于1405年出生在英国素瑞奧可哈姆时，他的父亲William de Weston VI25岁，母亲Matilda Herrberger26岁。他和Margaret Richking至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他于1448年在英国素瑞被列为escheator of the king。他去世于1466年7月3日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞奧可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Weston VII was born in 1405, in Ockham, Surrey, England, his father, William de Weston VI, was 25 and his mother, Matilda Herrberger, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret Richking. In 1448, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as escheator of the king in Surrey, England. He died on 3 July 1466, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Ockham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Weston VII est né en 1405, à Ockham, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William de Weston VI, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda Herrberger, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret Richking. En 1448, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est escheator of the king à Surrey, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1466, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Ockham, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Weston VII 1405 in Ockham, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Weston VI 25 und seine Mutter Matilda Herrberger 26. Er hatte mit Margaret Richking mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1448, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als escheator of the king in Surrey, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Juli 1466 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ockham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Weston VII è nato il nel 1405 nel Ockham, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William de Weston VI, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Herrberger, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret Richking. Nel 1448, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come escheator of the king nel Surrey, England. Morì il 3 luglio 1466, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Ockham, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Weston VIIが1405年にイギリススリーオックハムで生まれた時，父William de Weston VIは25歳，母Matilda Herrbergerは26歳であった。彼はMargaret Richkingとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1448年，43歳の時，イギリススリーでの職業はescheator of the kingと記録されている。彼は1466年7月3日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーオックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Weston VII(이)가 1405년 영국 수리 옥카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Weston VI(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Herrberger(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret Richking(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1448년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 수리에서 escheator of the king이었다. 그는 1466년 7월 3일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 옥카에 묻혔다.

mn.Christ Church, Ockham, Surrey, England: Ockham, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Weston VII nasceu em 1405, em Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Weston VI, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Herrberger, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret Richking. Em 1448, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como escheator of the king em Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1466, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Weston VII родился в 1405 г. в местности оккхам, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Weston VI было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Herrberger, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret Richking. В 1448 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии escheator of the king в местности сурри, Англия. Он умер 3 июля 1466 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности оккхам, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Weston VII nació en 1405, en Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Weston VI, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Matilda Herrberger, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret Richking. En 1448, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era escheator of the king en Surrey, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de julio de 1466, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
